title: Joe Mbu (rugby league)
description: DR Congolese RL coach and former professional rugby league footballer
extract: Joe Mbu (born 11 November 1983), also known by the nickname of "Big Joe", is a Congolese former professional rugby league footballer and coach. Mbu played for the London Broncos/Harlequins RL in the Super League. He is the current head coach of the North Herts Crusaders.
